title: Procrastination SMP Remastered
description: A new and improved version of the modpack used in the old Procrastination SMP
body:
This modpack is intended to be used by myself and some friends on a little modded smp we have. It's supposed to have a lot to explore, from the many unique biomes to the bountiful structures that populate the landscapes. In addition, there are numerous little side-tasks and activities you can do, such as playing music, painting and building a grand train system! There is a lot of building related stuff too, such as furniture blocks, and a lot of new blocks, from the many wood sets, to highly varied stone-blocks.

(if you are creating a world and want stunning world gen, select the default world generation preset and press customise to access reterraforged)
